title: Pityopsis oligantha
intro: Pityopsis oligantha, commonly known as small-flowered greenthread, is a perennial plant species native to the southeastern United States. The health benefits of Pityopsis oligantha include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throat, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpenes and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Pityopsis oligantha is often made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and is used to treat a range of conditions, including coughs, colds, and digestive issues.
taxonomy: Pityopsis oligantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the sunflower or daisy family.
